title: panicularia erecta
intro: Paniculária erecta is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paniculária erecta include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
